section:
KTN::StackerTimer Class Reference KTN::StackerTimer
The StackerTimer class is a derived class of AlgoBaseV3 and TimerCallback. It implements various methods for managing a stacker timer algorithm.
#include <StackerTimer.hpp>
Inheritance diagram for KTN::StackerTimer:
Public Member Functions
StackerTimer (AlgoInitializer p)
Constructs a StackerTimer object.
virtual ~StackerTimer ()
Destroys the StackerTimer object.
void onJson (std::string json) override
Handles the JSON input.
void onLaunch (std::string json) override
Handles the launch event.
void onCalculate () override
Performs the calculation.
void onTrade (int index, double price, double size, int aggressor) override
Handles the trade event.
void minOrderExecution (KTN::OrderPod &ord, bool hedgeSent) override
Executes the minimum order execution.
void Enable (bool bEnable) override
Enables or disables the algorithm.
void ResetPosition () override
Resets the position.
void Print () override
Prints the algorithm details.
void ToggleCommand (int id) override
Toggles a command.
void Restart () override
Restarts the algorithm.
void onTimerStateChange (TimerState::Enum state)
Handles the timer state change event.
void onTimerInterval (TimerInterval::Enum interval)
Handles the timer interval event.
vector< string > Symbols ()
Gets the list of symbols.
Public Member Functions inherited from KTN::AlgoBaseV3
AlgoBaseV3 (AlgoInitializer params)
Constructs a new AlgoBaseV3 object.
virtual ~AlgoBaseV3 ()
Destructor for AlgoBaseV3.
std::string GUID ()
Returns the globally unique identifier (GUID) of the algorithm.
void Poll ()
Polls the system for events.
virtual void onEngineJson (EngineCommand &cmd)
Processes algo engine-specific commands.
virtual void onMktData (int index)
Handles market data updates.
virtual void onHeartbeat (int msgseqnum)
Handles session heartbeat events.
virtual void onSessionStatus (std::string exch, int mktsegid, int protocol, std::string desc, std::string state)
Handles session status updates.
void onSpreadLegOrderExecution (KTN::Order &ord)
Executes spread leg orders.
virtual void minOrderAck (KTN::OrderPod &ord) override
This method is called when a minimum order acknowledgement is received.
virtual void minOrderCancel (KTN::OrderPod &ord) override
This method is called when a minimum order cancellation is received.
virtual void minOrderModify (KTN::OrderPod &ord) override
This method is called when a minimum order modification is received.
virtual void minOrderReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const std::string &text)
Handles order rejection events.
virtual void minOrderCancelReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const std::string &text)
virtual void minOrderCancelReplaceReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const std::string &text)
virtual void onHedgeOrderSent (char *clordid, uint64_t reqid, int32_t secid, KOrderSide::Enum side, uint32_t qty, int32_t price9, uint16_t instindex)
Handles hedge order sent events.
virtual void onOrderSent (char *clordid, uint64_t reqid, int32_t secid, KOrderSide::Enum side, uint32_t qty, int32_t price, KOrderAlgoTrigger::Enum trig)
Handles order sent events.
virtual void Shutdown ()
Shuts down the algorithm.
void shutdownHandler ()
Shuts down the algorithm handler.
virtual void onMktDataBidAsk (const algomd &md)
Handles bid-ask market data updates.
virtual void onMktDataTrade (const algomd &md)
Handles trade market data updates.

This method is called when the state of the algorithm changes.

This method is called when the session status changes.

This method is called when a minimum order rejection is received.

This method is called when a minimum order cancellation rejection is received.

This method is called when a minimum order cancel/replace rejection is received.

Detailed Description
The StackerTimer class is a derived class of AlgoBaseV3 and TimerCallback. It implements various methods for managing a stacker timer algorithm.
Constructor & Destructor Documentation
StackerTimer() StackerTimerKTN::StackerTimer KTN::StackerTimerStackerTimer
KTN::StackerTimer::StackerTimer (AlgoInitializer p)
Constructs a StackerTimer object.
Parameters
p
The AlgoInitializer object.
References KTN::notify::Slacker::InitAndRun(), and KtnCmeMdpV4::SetHandleTrades().
~StackerTimer() ~StackerTimerKTN::StackerTimer KTN::StackerTimer~StackerTimer
KTN::StackerTimer::~StackerTimer ( )[virtual]
Destroys the StackerTimer object.
References KTN::ALGO::SimpleTimer::Started(), and KTN::ALGO::SimpleTimer::Stop().
Member Function Documentation
Enable() EnableKTN::StackerTimer KTN::StackerTimerEnable
void KTN::StackerTimer::Enable (bool bEnable)[override], [virtual]
Enables or disables the algorithm.
Parameters
bEnable
A boolean indicating if the algorithm should be enabled.
Implements KTN::AlgoBaseV3.
References OrderManagerV5::ClearDeadOrders(), algometa::Enabled, instrument::lastAsk, instrument::lastBid, instrument::lastSentBuyPrice, instrument::lastSentSellPrice, KTN::ALGO::SimpleTimer::Pause(), and KTN::ALGO::SimpleTimer::Started().
Referenced by minOrderExecution(), onJson(), and ResetPosition().
minOrderExecution() minOrderExecutionKTN::StackerTimer KTN::StackerTimerminOrderExecution
void KTN::StackerTimer::minOrderExecution (KTN::OrderPod & ord, bool hedgeSent)[override], [virtual]
Executes the minimum order execution.
Parameters
ord
The OrderPod object.
hedgeSent
A boolean indicating if the hedge is sent.
Reimplemented from KTN::AlgoBaseV3.
References KTN::OrderPod::exchordid, KTN::notify::slackmsg::color, Enable(), KTN::OrderPod::lastpx, KTN::OrderPod::lastqty, OrderManagerV5::minOrderExecSpreadLeg(), OrderManagerV5::minOrderExecution(), KTN::OrderPod::OrdAlgoTrig, KTN::OrderPod::orderReqId, KTN::OrderPod::OrdFillType, KTN::OrderPod::OrdSide, KTN::OrderPod::OrdState, KTN::notify::slackmsg::preview, KTN::OrderPod::secid, KTN::notify::Slacker::Send(), KTN::ALGO::SimpleTimer::Started(), KTN::ALGO::SimpleTimer::Stop(), and KTN::notify::slackmsg::text.
onCalculate() onCalculateKTN::StackerTimer KTN::StackerTimeronCalculate
void KTN::StackerTimer::onCalculate ( )[override], [virtual]
Performs the calculation.
Implements KTN::AlgoBaseV3.
References algomd::ask, algomd::bid, instrument::mintick, KTN::OrderPod::OrdAlgoTrig, instrument::secid, and instrument::symbol.

Handles the JSON input.
Parameters
json
The JSON string.
Implements KTN::AlgoBaseV3.
References instrument::activeQuoting, Enable(), algometa::Enabled, KTN::ALGO::SimpleTimer::Expired(), instrument::lastAsk, instrument::lastBid, instrument::lastSentBuyPrice, instrument::lastSentSellPrice, KTN::ALGO::SimpleTimer::Pause(), ResetPosition(), KTN::ALGO::SimpleTimer::Start(), and KTN::ALGO::SimpleTimer::Started().
Referenced by onLaunch().

void KTN::StackerTimer::onLaunch (std::string json)[override], [virtual]
Handles the launch event.
Parameters
json
The JSON string.
Implements KTN::AlgoBaseV3.
References onJson(), and StackerTimerParams::parse().

void KTN::StackerTimer::onTimerInterval (TimerInterval::Enum interval)[virtual]
Handles the timer interval event.
Parameters
interval
The TimerInterval enumeration value.
Implements TimerCallback.

void KTN::StackerTimer::onTimerStateChange (TimerState::Enum state)[virtual]
Handles the timer state change event.
Parameters
state
The TimerState enumeration value.
Implements TimerCallback.

void KTN::StackerTimer::onTrade (int index, double price, double size, int aggressor)[override], [virtual]
Handles the trade event.
Parameters
index
The index of the trade.
price
The price of the trade.
size
The size of the trade.
aggressor
The aggressor of the trade.
Reimplemented from KTN::AlgoBaseV3.
References instrument::secid.

Reimplemented from KTN::AlgoBaseV3.
References instrument::effective, Enable(), algometa::Enabled, instrument::lastAsk, instrument::lastBid, instrument::lastSentBuyPrice, instrument::lastSentSellPrice, instrument::position, KTN::ALGO::SimpleTimer::Stop(), and instrument::totalexec.
Referenced by onJson().
